title: Settings
subtitle: Helix control center
localNotice: Changes stay local. Features marked as planned do not yet create persistent state.

general.title: General behavior
general.description: Summary of the current mode and existing preferences. New controls will be enabled once they have end-to-end persistence.
general.restoredModeHint: Last mode persisted by the window manager.
general.autostartHint: Native autostart integration is not yet implemented.
general.restoreSessionHint: Requires explicit contract between window, conversation, and retention.

model.title: Model and access
model.description: Choose the inference path. The key stays masked and technical options live in Advanced.
model.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter or paste your secret key

pet.title: Pet and window behavior
pet.description: Real adjustments for the floating presence. Click contracts are shown below to make the flow predictable.
pet.hidePetHint: The app keeps running in the background and reopens with {{shortcut}} or menu bar.

click.singleClickHint: Opens the radial with the six main intents.
click.doubleClickHint: Opens the composer in normal mode.
click.dragHint: Repositions the pet window without triggering an action.
click.inspectorHint: Persisted preference will enter the next migration.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Current quick-access map. Shortcut editing depends on the Tauri host.

privacy.title: Context and privacy
privacy.description: Helix should make the used context visible and ask for confirmation for sensitive reads.
privacy.clipboardHint: Used by the composer and shown in the Context Bar.
privacy.screenshotHint: The OCR workflow requires approval before reading.
privacy.continuousHint: Out of scope until policy and persistent indicator exist.
privacy.secretsHint: Requires redaction pipeline before sending to provider.
privacy.retentionHint: Will be integrated with data policy and Artifacts.

profiles.description: Agent profiles and prompt library for response styles and behaviors.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.description: Detailed management remains on the Connectors page; this hub will bring together status, permissions, and last usage.
connectors.permissionsHint: Permissions, health check, and consumer Artifacts will be consolidated here.

artifacts.title: Experimental artifacts
artifacts.description: The initial catalog is read-only. Persistence, editing, and pinning to the radial will come after the foundation.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.description: Templates and executions remain on the Workflows page. Global preferences enter after runtime validation.
workflows.pinRadialHint: Will be fed by the same Action Registry used by the pet.
workflows.defaultApprovalHint: Must respect workflow and tool permission levels.

skills.description: Custom agent skills with provider, model, and tool configurations.

data.title: Data and history
data.description: Destructive actions will only be enabled with scope, confirmation, and read-back.
data.exportHint: Format and contents of the package need to be defined.
data.clearCacheHint: Requires separating reconstructable cache from user data.
data.resetHint: Will remain protected by explicit confirmation.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Real technical options and diagnostics for the Bun sidecar.
advanced.timeoutError: Use a value between 5 and 600 seconds.
advanced.sidecarHint: Health check and restart are already part of the shell.
